mapper.sql: room_id, dormitory_id, room_name, room_detail, has_air_conditioner, monthly_fee, area_sqm, capacity, room_type, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (room_id, dormitory_id, room_name, room_detail, has_air_conditioner, monthly_fee, area_sqm, capacity, room_type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{dormitoryId}, #{roomName}, #{roomDetail}, #{hasAirConditioner}, #{monthlyFee}, #{areaSqm}, #{capacity}, #{roomType}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId}, room_name = #{roomName}, room_detail = #{roomDetail}, has_air_conditioner = #{hasAirConditioner}, monthly_fee = #{monthlyFee}, area_sqm = #{areaSqm}, capacity = #{capacity}, room_type = #{roomType}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE room SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM room WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT r.room_id, r.room_name, r.room_detail, r.has_air_conditioner, r.monthly_fee, r.area_sqm, r.capacity, r.room_type, CASE WHEN COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) >= r.capacity THEN 'OCCUPIED' ELSE 'VACANT' END AS vacancy_status FROM room r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rh.room_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM residence_history rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_in_date <= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE) AND (rh.move_out_date IS NULL OR rh.move_out_date >= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE)) GROUP BY rh.room_id ) active ON active.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.room_id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM room WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY room_id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM room WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM room r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT rh.room_id, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM residence_history rh WHERE rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.move_in_date <= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE) AND (rh.move_out_date IS NULL OR rh.move_out_date >= COALESCE(#{asOfDate}, CURRENT_DATE)) GROUP BY rh.room_id ) active ON active.room_id = r.room_id WHERE r.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND COALESCE(active.cnt, 0) < r.capacity

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM room r JOIN dormitory d ON d.dormitory_id = r.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL
AND d.gender_type = #{gender}
